zh.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley是Robert Horsley和Joan Strother的兒子，於1381年11月30日出生在英國諾圖波藍德法爾納姆。他於大約1404年與Elizabeth Swinburne在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1444年在英國諾圖波藍德法爾納姆享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley是Robert Horsley和Joan Strother的儿子，于1381年11月30日出生在英国諾圖波藍德法爾納姆。他于大约1404年与Elizabeth Swinburne在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1444年在英国諾圖波藍德法爾納姆享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Horsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northeastern England): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hors ‘horse’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, such as Horsley (Derbyshire, Gloucestershire), Long Horsley (Northumberland), and Horseley Hills Farm in Wolverley (Worcestershire), probably referring to a place where horses were put out to pasture.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley was born on 30 November 1381, in Farnham, Northumberland, England as the son of Robert Horsley and Joan Strother. He married Elizabeth Swinburne about 1404, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1444, in Farnham, Northumberland, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley est né le 30 novembre 1381, à Farnham, Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de Robert Horsley et Joan Strother. Il a épousé Elizabeth Swinburne environ 1404, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1444, à Farnham, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley wurde am 30. November 1381 in Farnham, Northumberland, England, als Sohn von Robert Horsley und Joan Strother geboren. Er hat um 1404 in Northumberland, England Elizabeth Swinburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1444 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Farnham, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley è nato il il 30 novembre 1381 nel Farnham, Northumberland, England come figlio di Robert Horsley e Joan Strother. Lui sposato Elizabeth Swinburne circa 1404, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1444, nel Farnham, Northumberland, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Horsleyは1381年11月30日にイギリスノースウンバーランドファルンハムでRobert HorsleyとJoan Strotherの息子として生まれた。約1404年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでElizabeth Swinburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1444年にイギリスノースウンバーランドファルンハムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley(은)는 1381년 11월 30일 영국 노르스벌랜드 패른함에서 Robert Horsley(와)과 Joan Strother의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Elizabeth Swinburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1444년 영국 노르스벌랜드 패른함에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Norðhymbra land, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley nasceu em 30 de novembro de 1381, em Farnham, Northumberland, Inglaterra filho de Robert Horsley e Joan Strother. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Swinburne aproximadamente 1404, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1444, em Farnham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley родился 30 ноября 1381 г. в местности фарнам, нортумбирланд, Англия. Его родителей звали Robert Horsley и Joan Strother. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Swinburne около 1404 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1444 г. в местности фарнам, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Horsley nació el 30 de noviembre de 1381, en Farnham, Northumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert Horsley y Joan Strother. Se casó con Elizabeth Swinburne aproximadamente 1404, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1444, en Farnham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
